prompt: The safety-plan feature needs a hook to store the user's personal safety plan. It has these fields: warning_signs (text array), coping_strategies (text array), reasons_to_live (text array), and emergency_contacts (JSON). All fields are sensitive and need encryption. I only need read and update - no create or delete since each user has exactly one safety plan.
assertions: Sensitive fields are encrypted before INSERT or UPDATE db.runAsync calls.
The read path uses Promise.allSettled instead of Promise.all.
The query key root uses the table name.
The test file defines mock functions before any jest.mock() calls.
The test file imports the hook only after all jest.mock() declarations.
The generated hook and test use logger and contain no console.* calls.
The generated hook and test contain no any types.
The output defines read and update operations only, with no create hook and no delete hook.
